title: COVID Pandemic Era
html:
COVID Pandemic Era

The March-through-late-2020 stretch when 17-year-old Yahir, locked down in Grants Pass in his senior year of high school, ran more parallel intellectual workstreams than any other period of comparable length in the corpus. The pandemic functions in the Grants Pass teen era as a forced acceleration — school went remote, time opened up, the economy crashed in real time, and Yahir treated all three as raw material. The notes from this stretch read like a junior analyst's day-planner that decided to also become a futures-research desk and a survival-tactics journal at the same time.

The clearest specimens come three days apart in late March 2020. March 24 (2020 03 24 exogenous event 911) — eleven days into the COVID crash — is the five-line macro thesis: "EXOGENOUS EVENT, like 9/11, already underlined with ropes conditions today, like the dot com bubble", plus the prediction that government money injection works temporarily, fails, and recovery only comes when "life returns to normal." March 30 (2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist) is the dump version of the same brain: a value investing watchlist (Carnival, Live Nation, Emerson, Beyond Meat, Zoom, Hertz, recruitment stocks), a post pandemic futures list (China tracking apps, India infrastructure, mass digital migration, surveillance state from contact tracing, "PEOPLE WILL SWITCH FROM OLDER GENERATION THINKING OF AVOIDING AND DISBELIEVING SCIENCE"), parallel hustles (FBA, eBay reselling, candy machine, marketing for business), real-life admin (prep dad's loan paperwork, apply at Walmart/Albertsons/Fred Meyer/Wild River), and a "Travis" cold-outreach template. The "quibi ?" line is a perfect timestamp — the service launched the next month and folded inside a year. April 23 (2020 04 23 go to diamond) is the Munger-quoting peak: custodial TDA account opening with mom, "Go where they ain't", "What's within your circle of competence?", the mini-pet-mart job interview prep, and "Gain competitive advantage by learning about ai and making useful for all / Think beginning of internet with aol and computers only for spreadsheets" — six years before Rankett.

The pandemic also surfaces in the corpus as dreams. The 2020 tribal fight dream (May, JoJo-inflected ability battle with the GP crew vs Trump and Harley Quinn, Yahir singled out in a hallway) and the home shooter dream (June, mom orchestrates a fake home invasion to test Yahir's readiness, he freezes) are pandemic-era dream logs that read as the unconscious version of the fear-of-not-doing-vs-fear-of-doing axiom that becomes voluntary adversity two years later. Lockdown gave the anxieties room to crystallize.

The era's load-bearing meta-pattern is the macro brain and the survival brain running the same lap. Yahir at 17 was trading futures research, scholarship apps, FBA prep, and dad-loan paperwork in the same notebook entries. The bridge income pattern that hardens in 2025 Austin is structurally identical to what shows up in March 2020 Grants Pass. The pandemic was where Yahir first practiced the operating mode he'd live in five years later.

Source summaries

  • 2020 03 24 exogenous event 911
  • 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist
  • 2020 04 23 go to diamond
  • 2020 05 07 dream tribal fight
  • 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep

Connections
